title: Bitdeer Technologies Group (BTDR) Q3 2024 Earnings Preview
text: Bitdeer Technologies Group (BTDR) Q3 2024 earnings release date was November 18, 2024. Key consensus estimates for Q3 2024 included revenue of $78.85 million and EPS of -$0.08 per share. Full year 2024 projections showed revenue of $388.58 million and EPS of -$0.25 per share. Over the past 90 days, analyst expectations have been trimmed downward. Revenue estimates for the full year 2024 have declined from $408.49 million to $388.58 million. For 2025, projections dropped from $573.78 million to $552.36 million. In Q2 2024, Bitdeer missed revenue expectations significantly. The company reported $99.23 million against the expected $108.925 million, falling short by approximately 8.9%. Earnings disappointment was more severe, posting -$0.14 per share versus the anticipated $0.004 per share. Based on 11 analyst price targets, the average projection is $13.89, suggesting potential upside of 25.26% from the current stock price of $11.09. The consensus recommendation rating averages 1.9, indicating an Outperform status.
